front: Author: Laura Trevelyan's deep connection with the title German explorer, who leads an expedition across Australia and dies in the Outback
Author: Mordecai, a Holocaust survivor, is subjected to a mock crucifixion outside a bicycle lamp factory

Author: novel based on the real naturalist and explorer Ludwig Leichhardt

Author: won the 1973 Nobel Prize in Literature; set up a namesake literary award first won by Christina Stead
